item.title: acaseofthegolf1: Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 6min “Edit out the part where i said funding was running out at the end of the year and
item.description: Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 6min “Edit out the part where i said funding was running out at the end of the year and repost it like nothing happened”. Cita TNT Sports @tntsports · 2h We spoke with LIV Golf CEO Scott O’Neil on the future of the league 2:28 3 2 47 2 mil

item.title:
AustinKarp: Josh Carpenter reposteó Austin Karp @AustinKarp · 1h Great golf wagering info from my colleague @Bill_KingSBJ :
Betti
item.description:
Josh Carpenter reposteó Austin Karp @AustinKarp · 1h Great golf wagering info from my colleague @Bill_KingSBJ :
Betting handle on @PGATOUR events -- not counting the Masters, which does its own thing -- is up 33% vs. this time last year.
The number of bets is pacing 18% ahead.
The number of people betting is up 15%. 1 2 1 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 41min Scottie Scheffler hit every fairway (14/14) during his second-round 67 at
item.description: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 41min Scottie Scheffler hit every fairway (14/14) during his second-round 67 at the RBC Heritage, marking the fourth time in his career with 100% driving accuracy in a single round on TOUR (569 rounds). He is the first player to do so at Harbour Town since J.T. Poston in 2023 (R2). 2 4 25 5 mil

item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 1h #FULL STEAM AHEAD — Ian Poulter addresses the recent talk about LIV Golf’s future
“We’ve had
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 1h #FULL STEAM AHEAD — Ian Poulter addresses the recent talk about LIV Golf’s future
“We’ve had heat for 5 years, 48 hours is not really that much of a distraction. We’ve got a great product and we’ve changed numerous things…”
(Via: @MajesticksGC ) De BENNY BOOMS ARMY 42 9 95 52 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 1h Matt Fitzpatrick cards a second-round 63 and currently leads by four strokes
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 1h Matt Fitzpatrick cards a second-round 63 and currently leads by four strokes at the RBC Heritage.
It marks the second 63 of his career at Harbour Town Golf Links (2023/R3/Won) as Fitzpatrick seeks to become the 11th player to earn multiple titles at the RBC Heritage. 2 4 30 8 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 1h En respuesta a @PGATOURComms Fitzpatrick's 63 ties his career low on TOUR in
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 1h En respuesta a @PGATOURComms Fitzpatrick's 63 ties his career low on TOUR in his 185th start (621 total rounds):
2026 RBC Heritage (R2) 2025 Genesis Scottish Open (R2) – T4 2025 Travelers Championship (R3) – T17 2024 Travelers Championship (R3) – T36 2023 RBC Heritage (R3) – Won 7 4 mil
